search_queries_used: site:bad.org.uk/pils plantar warts verrucae features pain bleeding immunocompromise
rejection_reasons: Cryotherapy procedure instructions were outside documentation-only scope.
Salicylic-acid treatment content was outside scope.
Automated classifiers could imply diagnosis or malignancy exclusion.
population_applicability: Direct for plantar warts or verrucae; general, periungual, facial, and genital warts are outside the exact source scope.
setting_applicability: Supports primary and dermatology lesion history and examination documentation only.
UAE_applicability: No exact UAE wart source was identified; BAD content requires UAE clinician adaptation.
recency_verification: Official BAD page was reviewed on 2026-07-13; its planned June 2025 review is overdue.
superseded_check: No newer BAD plantar-warts leaflet was identified, but recency remains a blocker.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports plantar wart or verruca identity, surface, black dots, count, location, spread, and pain.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports verruca or wart identity, rough surface, black dots or thrombosed capillaries, location, count, spread, and pain.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports persistence, bleeding, rapid change, pain, infection concern, and immunocompromise prompts without management advice.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports persistence, bleeding, rapid change, pain, infection concern, and immunocompromise as documentation prompts without an automatic management conclusion.

unresolved_source_gaps: The source is plantar-specific and has an overdue review date.
Non-plantar wart sites, dermoscopy, infection, general skin care, observation, treatment discussion, fixed follow-up, medicine, and procedures remain unsupported.
Qualified UAE clinician review is required.

legacy_item_support_mappings.direct_relationship: The exact BAD section supports plantar-wart and verruca identity plus these lesion features; broader sites remain unsupported.
